# 2026-03-04 News - Montague Tech

## Denver Tech Summit Kicks Off with API Innovation Focus
**Source:** techcrunch.com | **Time:** 08:30
The Denver Tech Summit opened with a focus on API interoperability. Both Montague Tech and Capulet Industries are presenting competing solutions. Industry analysts expect the API gateway market to reach $12B by 2028.

## Capulet Industries Keynote Draws Standing Ovation
**Source:** internal | **Time:** 10:15
Juliet Capulet's keynote on unified API gateways was the talk of the conference. Several attendees noted similarities to Montague Tech's approach.
